subject: M crashing after lower binning
body:
Hi all,

After using M, the resulting resolution was close to Nyquist so, I 
extracted subtomograms in M using a lower binning and did a refinement in 
Relion to import again in M. However, now it crashes every time in the step 
4/5 (Training the denoising model).

Did anyone experience something like this before?

Thanks!
JC
